title: batrachium biternatum
intro: Batrachium biternatum, also known as the least duckweed or biternate duckweed, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Ranunculaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Batrachium biternatum are said to include the reduction of fever, relief from rheumatic pain, and the treatment of various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
